criteria.name: Professional Experience
criteria.description: Demonstrated tenure in professional software development roles.
signals: 2-5 years of full-time software engineering experience
Experience working in a professional team environment
History of maintaining production-level web services

criteria.name: Backend Programming Proficiency
criteria.description: Strong technical skills in core backend languages.
signals: Professional experience with Python, Java, C#, or JavaScript
Evidence of designing and implementing RESTful or internal APIs
Demonstrated ability to write unit and integration tests

criteria.name: Database Management
criteria.description: Practical experience designing and interacting with relational databases.
signals: Experience with relational database schema design
Hands-on work with databases like PostgreSQL, MySQL, or SQL Server

criteria.name: DevOps and Tooling
criteria.description: Competency in version control, deployment pipelines, and infrastructure.
signals: Proficiency with Git for version control
Experience configuring or maintaining CI/CD pipelines
Exposure to cloud platforms such as AWS, Azure, or GCP

criteria.name: Educational Background
criteria.description: Formal education or equivalent practical experience in computer science.
signals: Degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, or related field
Evidence of equivalent practical experience in lieu of a degree
